hypothesis: A2 arm: a reject-only evidence verifier over the high-recall seizure-frequency candidate surface improves ExECT S5 seizure_frequency precision without materially reducing recall or regressing guarded S5 families.
metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is the preregistered A2 gate; it is not a full-validation performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S5 diagnostics (five core families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
The verifier may reject initial seizure_frequency labels but may not add labels or repair false negatives.
Only seizure_frequency candidates are injected; the high-recall candidate builder is unchanged.
Annotated medication uses the existing non-ASM/brand-alias guard unchanged.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation; treat as schema/gate signal only.
Report per-family F1 and monitor guard families (diagnosis, seizure type, annotated medication, investigation).
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
